data.content:
Plan review requests revision.

1. The plan does not preserve all unrelated settings currently clobbered by the shell writers. Both writers still hardcode `[backend] type = "auto"` and `[defaults] profileId = ""` in `scripts/setup.sh:653-654` and `scripts/agent-wizard.sh:245-246`, and the schema still persists `terminalLightTheme` in `src/lib/schemas.ts:196-206`. Step 1 only proposes loading dispatch/default concurrency, agents, actions, pools, and scope refinement prompt, and Step 6 incorrectly says no writer changes are needed. As written, rerunning setup would still overwrite backend/defaults and drop terminalLightTheme, which violates the additive-update requirement for unrelated configuration.

2. The proposed test additions in `src/lib/__tests__/setup-settings-writer.test.ts:12-177` only exercise writer round-trips. They do not verify the acceptance criterion that the CLI shows current configuration before prompting, nor that step-scoped edits keep current selections by default. Revise the plan to include shell-flow coverage that seeds an existing settings file, runs the relevant wizard path, and asserts both preserved values and the displayed/defaulted current selections.
